name: QA 1134
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1134

Exercise pmrep/pcp2json/pcp2xml output with challenging values.



Copyright (c) 2017 Red Hat.



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py ubuntu2404-container reproduce
